title: Hallomuellera lineata
taxonomy: Hallomuellera lineata belongs to the family Acanthaceae and is a species of flowering plant native to Australia. It is a shrub-like plant with linear leaves and produces white or pink flowers. The classification of Hallomuellera lineata is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Lamiales, family Acanthaceae, genus Hallomuellera, species H. lineata. This plant is also known by other names, such as Rieffelia lineata. The classification of Hallomuellera lineata is still being researched and updated by botanists.
